caption:
The direct-to-video era never died — it just got a compute budget.

AI studios are running the classic B-movie playbook: ride the blockbuster wave, cut the costs, ship fast. Old Hollywood hustle, new Hollywood tools.

The economics make sense. The content... we'll see. 🎬

#AIFilm #GenerativeAI #AIVideo #DirectToVideo #AICreators #CreatorEconomy

story.title: AI startups release direct-to-video generated films as cash-grab strategy
story.dek: An AI startup is capitalizing on blockbuster hype by rushing out AI-generated films directly to digital release, mirroring decades-old direct-to-video B-movie economics.
